mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wheelchair_rentals ( wheelchair_type, start_date, end_date, customer_name, customer_tel, remarks ) VALUES ( #{wheelchairType}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{customerName}, #{customerTel}, #{remarks} )
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM wheelchair_rentals WHERE 1=1
AND end_date between #{startDate} and #{endDate}
AND customer_name like concat('%',#{customerName},'%')
AND customer_tel like concat('%',#{customerTel},'%')

SELECT * FROM wheelchair_rentals WHERE (payment is null OR payment = '')
AND DATE(end_date) <= now()
